case_title: PATELCO CREDIT UNION VS DONELLAN, MICHAEL J.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $732.60 FILED BY PATELCO CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT DONELLAN, MICHAEL J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-31-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DONELLAN, MICHAEL J.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONELLAN, MICHAEL J. $732.60 PRINCIPAL, $53.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $785.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DONELLAN, MICHAEL J.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $7.10 ACCRUED INTEREST, $77.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT DONELLAN, MICHAEL J.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DONELLAN, MICHAEL J.
